label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked inside final kilometer on punchy finish, dropped PEDERSEN Mads who took second, Bennett retained green despite puncture
tactical_patterns: Roglic contested intermediate mountain points despite leading GC, denying Alaphilippe to assert psychological dominance even when tactically unnecessary.
Pedersen bridged to Elissonde's attack in final kilometer but couldn't match Roglic's punch, revealing sprint specialists vulnerable on lumpy finales.
Bennett survived puncture to retain green because reduced sprint points at finish line limited Pedersen's ability to close jersey gap.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Attacked final kilometer on punchy finish and contested intermediate mountain points, showing form extends beyond pure climbing
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: Strong enough to take second on lumpy finish and gain intermediate sprint points, viable for undulating sprint stages
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: Puncture exposed vulnerability but retained green due to reduced sprint points available on lumpy finish
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Roglic denied him mountain points at intermediate sprint, suggesting world champion not yet dominant enough to control bonus opportunities
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Third place finish on punchy finale suggests recovering form for explosive climbing efforts
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: Strong finish on lumpy day indicates readiness for GC support or breakaway opportunities on medium mountain stages
